scripts.ci: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm test
scripts.package:vscode: pnpm build && pnpm --filter obsidian-vfs run package && ls -lhtr packages/vscode/*.vsix
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @obsidian-vfs/core publish && pnpm --filter @obsidian-vfs/cli publish
scripts.reset: pnpm -r run clean && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules && pnpm install
